title: Overlay-Master (adopter-local 8-pillar overlay)
description: Adopter-local 8-pillar overlay that pairs with foundation-master.json. Parallel structure to foundation-master — same pillar slots; adopter writes shadow foundation entries per R-52 collision tiebreaker (`_override_reason` required). Renamed from vault-overlay-schema.json + extended to 8-pillar parallel structure per Plan 81 SP13 Session 3 A32 + Session 6 A48 (system.timezone slot). Authored by SP14 Batch A T-14.1 (2026-05-18). Per-pillar $defs shapes are minimum-viable stubs ({type: object}); refinement happens once first overlay-master mutations land via `/govern register` per feedback_minimum_viable_foundation_scope.

system.description: Adopter-machine-local system config (per Session 6 A48). Foundation-master ships NO system slot — system config is procedural-local. Branch #2 hook reads .system.timezone for TZ-aware today resolution; falls back to America/New_York if absent.

timezone.description: IANA tz name; consumed by hook branch #2 TZ-aware today resolution

frontmatter_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for frontmatter-rules.json — parallel structure to foundation pillar. Stub min-viable; refines on first /govern register --kind file-type mutation.

tagging_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for tagging-rules.json — parallel structure. Stub min-viable; refines on first /govern register --kind tag-extension mutation.

naming_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for naming-rules.json — parallel structure. Stub min-viable; refines as adopter naming conventions accrete.

mandatory_files_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for mandatory-files-rules.json — parallel structure. Stub min-viable; refines as adopter mandatory-file declarations accrete.

doc_dependencies_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for doc-dependencies.json — parallel structure. Stub min-viable; the live vault-overlay shape (entries[]/entities{}) is preserved by overlay-master mutation library since the same cascade registry shape carries forward.

file_type_contracts_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for file-type-contracts/ — parallel structure (map keyed by file-type slug). Stub min-viable; refines on first /govern register --kind file-type mutation.

vault_writers_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for vault-writers-rules.json — parallel structure (operational-config + optional processing_defaults overrides). Stub min-viable; refines on first /govern register --kind writer mutation.

plans_pillar.description: Adopter shadow for plans-rules.json — parallel structure. Stub min-viable; plans-tree is global infrastructure so adopter shadowing is rare.
